params.name: Boy with a Pipe
params.description:
On Dec 29, 1905 AD, Picasso asked Little Louis to be his model and painted this painting.
Boy with a Pipe is a representative work of Picasso's Rose Period. The young man in the painting is a Parisian boy named Little Louis who often visited Picasso's studio to play. Picasso used him as a model to create this painting. Little Louis wears a blue work suit, holds a pipe in his left hand, wears a garland on his head, and is surrounded by two large bunches of flowers, giving it a poetic mood that …
